title: Debug Event Schema
description: Schema for validating structured debug event records.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this debug event.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of when the event occurred.

patch_id.description: The ID of the architectural patch associated with this event.

system.description: The game system or module where the event originated (e.g., 'SaveManager', 'GameLoop').

severity.description: The severity level of the debug event.

event_type.description: A specific type or category for the event (e.g., 'FileReadError', 'ValidationSuccess').

message.description: A human-readable message describing the event.

context.description: A dictionary of additional contextual data, with PII fields redacted.

safe_to_persist.description: True if the event contains no sensitive data and is safe to be persisted or shared.
